articles.title: Solana Surging Ahead Of Ethereum In This Particular Metric
articles.description: Recent market dynamics have seen Solana struggling to break above the $200 mark. A notable bearish factor among these market fundamentals is the recent reports of the estate of bankrupt cryptocurrency exchange FTX selling its $7.65 billion worth of Solana at a 68% discount to its current market price. Related Reading: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried […]

articles.title: Solana Meme Coins Stir Debate: Should Racist Tokens Be Blocked?
articles.description: A conversational debate commenced at the BUIDL Asia Summit in Seoul over Meme coins that feature offensive and racist language.

articles.title: Bitcoin Tapping Into $84,000,000,000,000 Market, BTC Adoption Now Overwhelming: Billionaire Mike Novogratz
articles.description: Galaxy Digital chief executive Mike Novogratz believes that Bitcoin now has access to an $84 trillion market following the approval of BTC spot market exchange-traded funds. Speaking at the Bitcoin Investor Day event in New York, the billionaire says BTC is witnessing a dramatic increase in adoption with the launch of the ETFs. He also […]
